name: BioNexus Gene Lab Corp
business: BioNexus Gene Lab Corp. distributes industrial chemical raw materials, primarily fiber-reinforced polymers, through its subsidiary Chemrex to manufacturers in Southeast Asia, and provides blood-based genomic screening services through its subsidiary MRNA Scientific for early disease risk assessment. The company also holds an exclusive license for the VitaGuard minimal residual disease platform in the ASEAN region, an AI-enabled liquid biopsy system for cancer recurrence monitoring.
sellsTo: Manufacturers, fabricators, and contractors in Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, and other Southeast Asian countries (Chemrex)
Healthcare providers, laboratories, hospitals, and corporate clients in Malaysia (MRNA Scientific)

exposures.sentence: Chemrex, our wholly owned subsidiary, is involved in the wholesale of chemical raw material products.
MRNA Scientific is engaged in the development and provision of blood-based genomic screening services intended to support early disease risk assessment and health management.
VitaGuard is a next-generation, AI-enabled platform for minimal residual disease (MRD) monitoring.
Continued expansion into digital healthcare markets, including the deployment of capital into Malaysian government co-investment projects.
On March 5, 2025, the Company announced its Ethereum-focused treasury strategy.
On March 7, 2025, we announced our strategic partnership with ML Tech to optimize the BGLC’s Ethereum-based growth strategies.
Actual or alleged failure to comply with privacy, cybersecurity and data protection-related laws and regulations could adversely affect MRNA Scientific’s business and reputation.

catalysts.event: Reverse stock split approved and effective
catalysts.sentence: The Reverse Stock Split became effective on April 7, 2025.
On March 5, 2025, the Company announced its Ethereum-focused treasury strategy.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with ML Tech announced
catalysts.sentence: On March 7, 2025, we announced our strategic partnership with ML Tech to optimize the BGLC’s Ethereum-based growth strategies.

catalysts.event: Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement with Fidelion
catalysts.sentence: On November 12, 2025, the Company entered into a Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement (the “SSSA”) by and among Fidelion, the Company, Tongshu Biotechnology (Hong Kong) Co., Limited (Tongshu), Mr. Su-Leng Tan Lee, Molecule Bio LLC and Rainy Morning Technology (Hong Kong) Limited.

catalysts.event: Exclusive Southeast Asia license for VitaGuard platform signed
catalysts.sentence: Pursuant to a Form 8-K filed on November 28, 2025, the Company announced that it has entered into a Licensing Agreement with Fidelion.

catalysts.event: Deployment phase of VitaGuard MRD platform commenced
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Company announced the formal commencement of the deployment phase for the VitaGuard MRD platform in connection with its licensing arrangement.

catalysts.event: Form S-3 filed and ATM program entered
catalysts.sentence: On November 7, 2025, the Company filed a registration statement on Form S-3 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to register up to $100 million of securities that may be offered from time to time.

catalysts.event: Equity Purchase Agreement with ARC Group International
catalysts.sentence: On November 28, 2025, the Company entered into an Equity Purchase Agreement (the “Purchase Agreement”) with ARC Group International Ltd. (ARC), the parent of ARC Group Securities, a FINRA registered broker/dealer.

tamClaims.claim: The composite raw materials market is expected to reach $40.2 billion by 2025 globally, growing at a CAGR of 3.3% from 2019 to 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The composite raw materials market is expected to reach an estimated $40.2 billion by 2025 globally and is forecasted to grow at a CAGR of 3.3% from 2019 to 2025.

tamClaims.claim: The composites end-user market is expected to reach $114.7 billion by 2025 globally.
tamClaims.sentence: Furthermore, the composites end-user market is expected to reach an estimated $114.7 billion by 2025 globally.
